name: cpig-booleans-scripted
description: Phase 6 gate subset of cpig-booleans (2026-07-02): the four cells whose CPig commands are fully SCRIPTABLE unattended — union / intersection / smoothUnion use a single preselection-honoring GetMultiple, so `_SelAll _CPigX` drives them. EXCLUDED: cpig-booleans-02 + 05 (difference) — `_CPigDifference` is a TWO-PHASE interactive pick (D4 UX fix 2026-06-19) whose SUBTRACTION-set prompt disables preselection (`EnablePreSelect(false)` in FieldOps.RunDifferenceTwoPhase), so no macro can drive phase B; those two cells run operator-ATTENDED only (their original D4 design) until CPig grows a RunMode.Scripted path (R1 ask; Phase 6 forbids touching CPig). Tests carry converged capture gating (WaitForPenumbraFrame requireSteady) + solo-perspective camera recipe + scene-scale decoy framing. Run: `canary run --workload rhino --suite cpig-booleans-scripted`.
